mainEntity.name: Do I have to see the warehouse's company doctor, or can I go to my own doctor for my injury?

acceptedAnswer.text: Initially, the employer usually picks the doctor. However, you often have a legal right to change doctors or get a second opinion. You must follow specific notice rules to ensure the insurance company still pays the bills.
